Log:
  json-yaml is a small command line utility to convert JSON to YAML.
  It is useful to get more readable output from web APIs and such.

  WWW: https://github.com/sjmulder/json-yaml

  PR:		230190
  Submitted by:	ik@sjmulder.nl
